CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver1__c), '', EmailReceiver1__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver2__c), '', EmailReceiver2__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver3__c), '', EmailReceiver3__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver4__c), '', EmailReceiver4__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver5__c), '', EmailReceiver5__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver6__c), '', EmailReceiver6__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver7__c), '', EmailReceiver7__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver8__c), '', EmailReceiver8__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver9__c), '', EmailReceiver9__c + ';') + IF(ISBLANK(EmailReceiver10__c), '', EmailReceiver10__c)
CustomField.label: fm_ReceiverList
